Median astrometric difference from Gaia.description: Median difference in Right Ascension or Declination between science objects and reference objects from Gaia DR3. The reference objects have been shifted to the median epoch of the science objects.

Astrometric repeatability percentage.description: The percentage of objects for which the the standard deviation across all visits exceeds 20 milliarcseconds for all stellar pairs separated by the chosen separation (in arcminutes).

Median Astrometric Repeatability.description: The median value for the standard deviation across all visits of the distance between stellar pairs separated by approximately the chosen separation (in arcminutes).

Astrometric Self-Repeatability.description: Median repeatability in Right Ascension or Declination after single-frame processing, where repeatability is defined as the standard deviation of the measured positions of associated sources.

Number of Peaks.description: Number of detected peaks on the coadd. This includes peaks that were deblended and peaks that failed to deblend or were skipped because they were from patches that required too much memory. Notice that the number of sources in the galactic plane, where we would expect the most sources, is actually very low. This is likely due to coadds that were unable to be created in the densest regions, resulting in a failure to even build a detection catalog.

Skipped Peaks.description: Number of peaks that were skipped during deblending. Most of these peaks were from crowded fields where a single patch was only covered by one or two blends and for DP2 the science pipelines are not yet robust enough to process blends that big due to memory constraints.

Residual Coadd PSF Ellipticity.description: Difference in complex ellipticity between stars and the coadd PSF model at the positions of those stars.

Residual Coadd PSF Size.description: Difference in size between stars and the coadd PSF model at the positions of those stars.

PSF-CModel.description: Difference in size between stars and the coadd PSF model at the positions of those stars.

Stellar Locus Scatter.description: Slope and scatter about the stellar locus for principle colors
